problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier may resolve How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
